prompt_text:
### Demographics: 63-year-old Asian woman

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 5 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 4 (15-29)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG)
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Pancreatic Cancer (post-treatment surveillance)
Recurrent Complicated Urinary Tract Infections
Major Depressive Disorder
Osteoporosis (on bisphosphonate therapy)
Appendicitis (status post appendectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 4 (15-29); HF (No); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of CABG); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older brother)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 10 years ago; 10 cigarettes/day for 25 years; ~12.5 pack-years); Alcohol 3-4 drinks/week (2-3 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Sertraline (50 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Losartan (50 mg daily), Ciprofloxacin (500 mg twice daily for 7 days), Alendronate (70 mg weekly), Calcium Carbonate 500 Mg + Cholecalciferol 1000 Iu (daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 86.1 kg; Height 162.8 cm; BMI 32.5 kg/m²; Blood pressure 131/72 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 6.7%; 9 months ago 6.4%; 6 months ago 6.5%; 3 months ago 6.5%; current 5.9%), FPG (12 months ago 153mg/dL; 9 months ago 129mg/dL; 6 months ago 129mg/dL; 3 months ago 137mg/dL; current 127mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 86.8kg; 9 months ago 84.3kg; 6 months ago 85.2kg; 3 months ago 85.8kg; current 86.1kg), Height (12 months ago 162.8cm; 9 months ago 162.8cm; 6 months ago 162.8cm; 3 months ago 162.8cm; current 162.8cm), BMI (12 months ago 33.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 32.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 32.0kg/m²; current 32.5kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 130mmHg; 9 months ago 130mmHg; 6 months ago 133mmHg; 3 months ago 133mmHg; current 131mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 75mmHg; 9 months ago 76mmHg; 6 months ago 72mmHg; 3 months ago 72mmHg; current 72mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 14U/L; 9 months ago 14U/L; 6 months ago 13U/L; 3 months ago 13U/L; current 12U/L), AST (12 months ago 32U/L; 9 months ago 33U/L; 6 months ago 30U/L; 3 months ago 31U/L; current 28U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.8mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.8mg/dL; current 0.8mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 24mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 22mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 21mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 20mL/min/1.73m²; current 21mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 444mg/g; 9 months ago 430mg/g; 6 months ago 446mg/g; 3 months ago 413mg/g; current 453mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 75mg/dL; 9 months ago 75mg/dL; 6 months ago 69mg/dL; 3 months ago 68mg/dL; current 72mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 53mg/dL; 9 months ago 51mg/dL; 6 months ago 50mg/dL; 3 months ago 50mg/dL; current 52mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 97mg/dL; 9 months ago 96mg/dL; 6 months ago 95mg/dL; 3 months ago 96mg/dL; current 104mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 13.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.0g/dL; 6 months ago 13.0g/dL; 3 months ago 12.2g/dL; current 12.3g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Negative (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
